    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Struct SparseWeight8

    Represents a sparse collection of non zero weight values, with a maximum of 8 weights.

    Implements
    IEquatable<SparseWeight8>
    Inherited Members
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetType()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Transforms
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public readonly struct SparseWeight8 : IEquatable<SparseWeight8>
    Remarks

    SparseWeight8 is being used in two different contexts:

    • As an utility structure to define per vertex joint weights in mesh skinning.
    • As an animation key in morph targets; a mesh can have many morph targets, but realistically and due to GPU limitations, only up to 8 morph targets can be blended at the same time.
    Constructors are designed so weightless values are not taken into account,
    and duplicated indices are merged, so indices are expected to be unique.

    Use static Create* methods to construct instances of SparseWeight8.

    IsWeightless

    Gets a value indicating whether all the weights in this SparseWeight8 are zero.
    this[int]

    Methods

    Name Description
    Add(in SparseWeight8, in SparseWeight8)

    Adds x with y element wise. If there's more than 8 non zero result values, the 8 most representative values are taken.
    Blend(ReadOnlySpan<SparseWeight8>, ReadOnlySpan<float>)
    Create(IEnumerable<float>)

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 from a weights collection. If there's more than 8 weighted values, the 8 heaviest values are taken.
    Create(IEnumerable<(int Index, float Weight)>)

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 from an indexed weight collection. If there's more than 8 weighted values, the 8 heaviest values are taken.
    Create(in Vector4, in Vector4)

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 struct.
    Create(in Vector4, in Vector4, in Vector4, in Vector4)

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 struct.
    Create(params float[])

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 from a weights collection. If there's more than 8 non zero values, the 8 most representative values are taken.
    Create(params (int Index, float Weight)[])

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 from an indexed weight collection. If there's more than 8 weighted values, the 8 heaviest values are taken.
    CreateUnchecked(in Vector4, in Vector4, in Vector4, in Vector4)

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 struct.
    Equals(SparseWeight8)
    Equals(object)
    Expand(int)
    GetHashCode()
    GetIndexedWeights()
    GetNormalized()
    GetTrimmed(int)
    InterpolateCubic(in SparseWeight8, in SparseWeight8, in SparseWeight8, in SparseWeight8, float)

    Interpolates (x , xt) with (y , yt) an amount. If there's more than 8 non zero result values, the 8 most representative values are taken.
    InterpolateLinear(in SparseWeight8, in SparseWeight8, float)

    Interpolates Linearly x with y an amount. If there's more than 8 non zero result values, the 8 most representative values are taken.
    Multiply(in SparseWeight8, in SparseWeight8)

    Multiplies x with y element wise. If there's more than 8 non zero result values, the 8 most representative values are taken.
    Multiply(in SparseWeight8, float)

    Multiplies x with y element wise. If there's more than 8 non zero result values, the 8 most representative values are taken.
    OrderedByIndex(in SparseWeight8)

    Returns a copy of this SparseWeight8 where all the indices have been reordered by index in ascending order.
    OrderedByWeight(in SparseWeight8)

    Returns a copy of this SparseWeight8 where all the indices have been reordered by weight in descending order.
    Subtract(in SparseWeight8, in SparseWeight8)

    Subtracts y from x element wise. If there's more than 8 non zero result values, the 8 most representative values are taken.
    ToString()
